subject: Excel opens downloaded file in Protected View — cannot edit
description: File from email opens read-only yellow bar; Enable Editing grayed for user.

ts_steps.title: Unblock file
ts_steps.action: File Properties on saved copy — check Unblock at bottom; reopen.

ts_steps.title: Trust location
ts_steps.action: Add trusted folder for known internal download path if policy allows.

ts_steps.title: DLP prompt
ts_steps.action: If corporate banner blocks edit, complete justification workflow or save to approved library.

internal_information: Mark of the Web zone identifier. DLP may overlay Excel. Different from macro blocking — check both.
